purpose: A Work Node binds one R&D milestone to an owner-accountable, scope-limited, grant-gated unit of executable work. Runtime-agnostic: the same node runs on Claude, Codex, or any adapter without governance state changing.

field_contract.work_node_id: Stable per-node identifier. Pattern ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*$. No secrets.
field_contract.goal_id: References the parent Goal in the company view. The node inherits the goal's risk_ceiling as an upper bound.
field_contract.milestone: Human-readable milestone this node completes. <=120 chars.
field_contract.owner: owner_id (role or person key) accountable for the node's verified outcome. The owner is who the manager projection is addressed to.

scope.repo_root: Workspace-relative directory this node may read/write. fff and diff are bound to this root.
scope.allowed_paths: List of path globs the node may modify. Diff must be a subset of these.
scope.excluded_paths: Path globs the node may never read or write (secrets, .env, credentials, home dir).

acceptance_criteria.tests_required: bool. If true, verification demands a test-result.json with failed=0.
acceptance_criteria.test_result_ref: Workspace-relative path to the test-result.json the verifier will read.
acceptance_criteria.diff_subset_of_scope: bool. If true, every changed file must fall under scope.allowed_paths.
acceptance_criteria.policy_hash: sha256 of the policy version in force when the node was created. Recorded at verification for traceability.
acceptance_criteria.min_action_receipts: int. Minimum count of Action Receipts required before verification (proves work was governed).

claude_adapter.budget: Injected from the Grant: max_tool_calls, max_cost_usd, timeout_ms.
claude_adapter.system_context: Task scope + acceptance criteria injected into the runtime. Never contains secrets or full memory.

field_contract.fff_binding: References fff-capability-spec.yaml. fff may only retrieve under scope.repo_root, honoring excluded_paths.

verification.verifier_type: One of: rule_check | test_gate | independent_checker. P0 uses test_gate.
verification.required_receipts: List of receipt types that must exist and pass before verified (action_receipt, artifact_receipt).

field_contract.risk_ceiling: L0-L4. May not exceed the parent goal's risk_ceiling.
field_contract.grant_id: Set when a Grant is issued for this node. Null until dispatch.
field_contract.verified_at: UTC ISO when the Broker wrote verified. Null otherwise.

invariants: An Agent can never write status=verified. Only the Broker sets verified after verify-work-node.ps1 passes.
A node whose Grant is revoked or expired transitions to blocked on the next capability call and appears blocked in the manager projection.
verified requires: acceptance_criteria satisfied, receipt chain complete, policy_hash recorded, and independent (non-executor) verification.
status, verified_at, and grant_id are the only mutable fields after create; all others are immutable.
Switching runtime adapter (Claude<->Codex) must not change work_node_id, grant_id, scope, or verification result.
